anatomy.description: The Button is composed of a container, a text label, and an optional leading or trailing icon. A focus ring appears on keyboard focus.

parts.name: container
parts.description: The outer wrapper element that defines the button's clickable area and visual boundary.

parts.name: label
parts.description: The text content of the button.

parts.name: icon
parts.description: An optional icon displayed before or after the label.

parts.name: focus-ring
parts.description: A visible outline that appears when the button receives keyboard focus.

anatomyEntry.name: container
anatomyEntry.description: The outer wrapper element that defines the button's clickable area and visual boundary.

anatomyEntry.name: label
anatomyEntry.description: The text content of the button. Communicates the action that will occur when activated.

anatomyEntry.name: icon
anatomyEntry.description: An optional icon displayed before (leading) or after (trailing) the label. Reinforces the label's meaning visually.

anatomyEntry.name: focus-ring
anatomyEntry.description: A visible outline that appears when the button receives keyboard focus. Must be visible in all color modes.
